content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "請問尺寸",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我想看這件上衣。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng kàn zhè jiàn shàngyī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 kan4 zhe4 jian4 shang4 yi1.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like to look at this top.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 이 상의를 보고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，請問你要什麼尺寸？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng wèn nǐ yào shénme chǐcùn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 wen4 ni3 yao4 shen2 me chi3 cun4?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, what size would you like?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 사이즈가 어떻게 되세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我想要中號的，有黑色的嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng yào zhōng hào de, yǒu hēisè de ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 xiang3 yao4 zhong1 hao4 de, you3 hei1 se4 de ma?",
          "translation_en": "I'd like a medium. Do you have it in black?",
          "translation_ko": "중간 사이즈로 원하는데, 검은색 있어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "有，這件黑色的中號很舒服，你要試穿嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, zhè jiàn hēisè de zhōng hào hěn shūfú, nǐ yào shìchuān ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3, zhe4 jian4 hei1 se4 de zhong1 hao4 hen3 shu1 fu2, ni3 yao4 shi4 chuan1 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Yes, this black medium is very comfortable. Would you like to try it on?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 이 검은색 중간 사이즈는 아주 편해요. 입어보시겠어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好，試衣間在哪裡？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo, shìyī jiān zài nǎlǐ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3, shi4 yi1 jian1 zai4 na3 li3?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, where is the fitting room?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 탈의실이 어디에 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "在前面左邊，請跟我來。",
          "pinyin": "Zài qiánmiàn zuǒ biān, qǐng gēn wǒ lái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zai4 qian2 mian4 zuo3 bian1, qing3 gen1 wo3 lai2.",
          "translation_en": "It's on the left ahead. Please follow me.",
          "translation_ko": "앞쪽 왼쪽에 있어요. 저를 따라오세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What size does the customer want?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 어떤 사이즈를 원하나요?",
          "options_en": ["Small", "Medium", "Large"],
          "options_ko": ["작은 사이즈", "중간 사이즈", "큰 사이즈"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after hearing it, focusing on the tones of 尺寸, 黑色, 試穿.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are a customer asking for a blue medium top. Say the question in Chinese."
    },
    {
      "title": "太貴了",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "這件外套很好看，可是太貴了。",
          "pinyin": "Zhè jiàn wàitài hěn hǎokàn, kěshì tài guì le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4 jian4 wai4 tao4 hen3 hao3 kan4, ke3 shi4 tai4 gui4 le.",
          "translation_en": "This jacket looks great, but it's too expensive.",
          "translation_ko": "이 외투는 정말 예쁜데, 너무 비싸요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "現在有打折，原價兩千塊，特價一千五。",
          "pinyin": "Xiànzài yǒu dǎzhé, yuán jià liǎng qiān kuài, tè jià yī qiān wǔ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xian4 zai4 you3 da3 zhe2, yuan2 jia4 liang3 qian1 kuai4, te4 jia4 yi1 qian1 wu3.",
          "translation_en": "It's on sale now. The original price is 2000, sale price is 1500.",
          "translation_ko": "지금 할인 중이에요. 원래 가격은 2000위안인데, 특가로 1500위안이에요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "可以再便宜一點嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ zài piányí yīdiǎn ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3 yi3 zai4 pian2 yi2 yi1 dian3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Can you make it a little cheaper?",
          "translation_ko": "조금 더 싸게 해 주실 수 있나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "不好意思，這是特價品，不能再打折了。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎoyìsi, zhè shì tè jià pǐn, bù néng zài dǎzhé le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4 si, zhe4 shi4 te4 jia4 pin3, bu4 neng2 zai4 da3 zhe2 le.",
          "translation_en": "Sorry, this is a sale item, so we can't discount it further.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 이건 특가 상품이라 더 할인이 안 됩니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好吧，那我買這件。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo ba, nà wǒ mǎi zhè jiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 ba, na4 wo3 mai3 zhe4 jian4.",
          "translation_en": "Alright, I'll buy this one then.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 그럼 이걸로 살게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "謝謝，請到收銀台結帳。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie, qǐng dào shōuyín tái jiézhàng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4 xie, qing3 dao4 shou1 yin2 tai2 jie2 zhang4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, please go to the cashier to pay.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 계산대에서 결제해 주세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why did the customer think the jacket was too expensive?",
          "question_ko": "손님이 외투가 너무 비싸다고 생각한 이유는 무엇인가요?",
          "options_en": ["It was not on sale", "The original price was high", "The color was wrong"],
          "options_ko": ["할인 중이 아니었다", "원래 가격이 높았다", "색상이 마음에 안 들었다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line, paying attention to the intonation of 太貴了 and 便宜一點.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are a customer. Say: 'This red skirt is too expensive. Can it be cheaper?'"
    },
    {
      "title": "試穿褲子",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我想試穿這條褲子。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng shìchuān zhè tiáo kùzi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 shi4 chuan1 zhe4 tiao2 ku4 zi.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like to try on these pants.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 이 바지를 입어보고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，請問你要什麼尺寸？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng wèn nǐ yào shénme chǐcùn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 wen4 ni3 yao4 shen2 me chi3 cun4?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, what size would you like?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 사이즈가 어떻게 되세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我要小號的，有藍色的嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yào xiǎo hào de, yǒu lánsè de ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yao4 xiao3 hao4 de, you3 lan2 se4 de ma?",
          "translation_en": "I'd like a small. Do you have it in blue?",
          "translation_ko": "작은 사이즈로 원하는데, 파란색 있어요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "有，這條藍色小號的，試衣間在後面右邊。",
          "pinyin": "Yǒu, zhè tiáo lánsè xiǎo hào de, shìyī jiān zài hòumiàn yòu biān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "You3, zhe4 tiao2 lan2 se4 xiao3 hao4 de, shi4 yi1 jian1 zai4 hou4 mian4 you4 bian1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, here's the blue small. The fitting room is on the right in the back.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 이 파란색 작은 사이즈예요. 탈의실은 뒤쪽 오른쪽에 있어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝，我試穿一下。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie, wǒ shìchuān yīxià.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4 xie, wo3 shi4 chuan1 yi1 xia4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, I'll try it on.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 잠깐 입어볼게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "這條褲子很合身，也很舒服。我要買。",
          "pinyin": "Zhè tiáo kùzi hěn héshēn, yě hěn shūfú. Wǒ yào mǎi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhe4 tiao2 ku4 zi hen3 he2 shen1, ye3 hen3 shu1 fu2. Wo3 yao4 mai3.",
          "translation_en": "These pants fit well and are very comfortable. I'll buy them.",
          "translation_ko": "이 바지는 잘 맞고 아주 편해요. 살게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，請到收銀台結帳。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng dào shōuyín tái jiézhàng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 dao4 shou1 yin2 tai2 jie2 zhang4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, please go to the cashier to pay.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 계산대에서 결제해 주세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What color pants did the customer try on?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무슨 색 바지를 입어봤나요?",
          "options_en": ["Black", "Blue", "Red"],
          "options_ko": ["검은색", "파란색", "빨간색"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line, focusing on the pronunciation of 褲子, 合身, 舒服.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Pretend you are a customer. Say: 'I want to try on these green pants, size large. Where is the fitting room?'"
    }
  ]
}
